data.content: Planning complete. Implementation should split the dialog into `Stage` and `Retake Now`, share the retake-state mutation path, and extract queued-screen rolling-ancestor detection into a shared helper so RetakesView checks full ancestry from unfiltered per-repo beats before launching `Take!`. Required regression coverage: a rolling grandparent behind a non-retake intermediate parent, plus tests that `Retake Now` updates first and only then starts the session.
